meaning: n.晶石,园材(如桅,桁等),争论,争吵
examples: He entered the ring to spar a few one-minute rounds with an old friend.
It makes as good a spar shear web as any material out there.
They always spar over trivial matters.
Officers were called to Spar on Willow Lane at about 01:30 GMT on Thursday.
It was found while emergency services dealt with a fire at a Spar shop.
